narrative_text: A curious little octopus named Ollie has just discovered a glowing, golden treasure chest buried deep in the shimmering turquoise reef. What do you think is hidden inside, and why is Ollie reaching for it so carefully?
branch_summary: An adventurous octopus finds a glowing treasure chest in a vibrant coral reef.
scene_description: A vibrant underwater coral reef at midday, with sunbeams piercing through the turquoise water to create dancing light patterns on the sandy floor. The mood is one of wonder and discovery, featuring a palette of neon pinks, deep blues, and shimmering golds. The composition is centered on a clearing in the reef where a character interacts with a focal object.

properties.color: bright coral orange with iridescent purple spots
properties.size: medium, roughly the size of a large coconut
properties.texture: smooth, rubbery skin with tiny visible suction cups
properties.pattern: speckled with glowing violet dots along the tentacles
properties.distinctive_features: large, expressive amber eyes and a tiny yellow bowtie made of seaweed

entities.pose: hovering mid-water with one tentacle extended cautiously toward the lid of the chest

properties.color: weathered oak brown with gleaming gold trim
properties.texture: rough, grainy wood with polished metallic edges
properties.distinctive_features: a faint golden glow emanating from the crack under the lid

entities.pose: half-buried in the soft white sand, tilted slightly to the left

properties.distinctive_features: a small blue sea snail crawling slowly over the top ridge

entities.pose: fixed firmly to the seabed floor

properties.color: deep forest green with translucent tips
properties.distinctive_features: long ribbon-like leaves that sway even when the water is still

entities.pose: waving gently in the current, reaching toward the surface

error_exclusions.reason: Ollie is the only octopus in the scene.
The chest is an inanimate object and does not move.
